content: Seems it will go in v6.13. Congrats @Alice Ryhl !
Yes, that's very nice. It's by far my oldest patchset.

If so, it might conflict with helper splits in rust-next, do you want to notify Christian? I would create a merge between rust-next and vfs.rust.file, and show the resolution. Alternatively, you can also offer sending a new version once v6.12-rc1 is out.
The branch apparently is meant to accept rebases, so I think it should be easy to solve that.
I will simply base my next version on top of the helper split.
